x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Preventive maintenance data enables Now Assist FSM to recommend proactive service before equipment failure.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Capture all preventive maintenance activities as work orders with type=preventive. Document outcomes in resolution notes and link to asset records. Target: 100+ closed PM work orders in the trailing 24 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb1
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Preventive maintenance data enables Now Assist FSM to recommend proactive service before equipment failure.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>FSM Preventive Maintenance Data</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // 24-month window for PM data — PM cycles are typically quarterly/annual
    // so 12 months may be too narrow to capture full PM history
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-2);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('wm_order');
    ga.addQuery('type', 'preventive');
    ga.addQuery('state', 'closed');
    ga.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' closed preventive maintenance work orders (last 24 months)';

    if (count >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' preventive maintenance records in the last 24 months. Now Assist FSM has sufficient PM history for AI predictive maintenance recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' preventive maintenance records in the last 24 months (target: 100+). Now Assist FSM predictive maintenance AI will have limited historical coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' preventive maintenance records in the last 24 months. Insufficient PM history for Now Assist FSM to provide meaningful predictive maintenance AI recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>FIELD_SERVICE</module>
<number>CHK0006066</number>
<order>140</order>
<remediation_guidance>Capture all preventive maintenance activities as work orders with type=preventive. Document outcomes in resolution notes and link to asset records. Target: 100+ closed PM work orders in the trailing 24 months.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb1</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
